robot_backend_mean_reward.conclusion: Local robot-backend mean-reward evidence does not show an Alberta advantage over PPO.

continual_obstacle_course.conclusion: Continual obstacle-course evidence does not currently support an Alberta advantage.

training_inputs.training_source: RL-from-simulation; trajectory_db tooling is not wired into the Alberta/PPO text-conditioned policy trainers.

visual_review.review_notes: Contact sheet shows Alberta, PPO, and SAC side by side. Alberta adapts to the new obstacle task and keeps task 0 stable; PPO shows task-0 drop; SAC remains low/flat in this smoke run.
